name: WNZN Power - Social Media Content Approval Pipeline (Donte → Barbara/Nana)

metadata.notes: Watches Notion content calendar DB. Triggers when Donte sets Status to 'Ready for Review'

mapper.subject: Content Review Needed — {{2.properties.Title.title[].plain_text}} ({{2.properties.Platform.select.name}})
mapper.body:
Barbara,

Donte has submitted a post for your review.

Platform: {{2.properties.Platform.select.name}}
Scheduled Date: {{formatDate(2.properties.Post_Date.date.start; 'MMMM D, YYYY')}}
Caption:

{{2.properties.Caption.rich_text[].plain_text}}

Hashtags: {{2.properties.Hashtags.rich_text[].plain_text}}

Visual/Image note: {{2.properties.Visual_Notes.rich_text[].plain_text}}

To approve: Open the Notion page and change Status to Approved.
To request edits: Change Status to Needs Edit and add a comment with your notes.

Open in Notion →

— Jessie (Automation Systems)

metadata.notes: Second watch trigger — fires when Barbara changes status to Approved

mapper.subject: ✅ Approved — {{4.properties.Title.title[].plain_text}} is cleared to post
mapper.body:
Donte,

Barbara approved the post. It's cleared to go live on {{formatDate(4.properties.Post_Date.date.start; 'MMMM D, YYYY')}} on {{4.properties.Platform.select.name}}.

Schedule it in Buffer/Later and mark the Notion page as Scheduled.

— Jessie

metadata.notes: Third watch trigger — fires when Barbara marks post as Needs Edit

mapper.subject: ✏️ Edits Needed — {{8.properties.Title.title[].plain_text}}
mapper.body:
Donte,

Barbara reviewed the post and has requested edits before it can be approved.

Post: {{8.properties.Title.title[].plain_text}}
Platform: {{8.properties.Platform.select.name}}

Check the Notion page for her comments, make the revisions, and re-submit by setting Status back to Ready for Review.

Open in Notion →

— Jessie
